name: Pocket Bread
recipeIngredient: 3 cups all-purpose flour (up to 1/2 cup more, if needed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve yeast in warm water in a large bowl.
2. Stir in oil, sugar, and salt. Gradually add 2 cups of flour until smooth.
3. Mix in the remaining flour until the dough is easy to handle.
4. Turn dough onto a lightly floured surface; knead for about 10 minutes or until smooth and elastic.
5. Place in a greased bowl; turn grease side up. Cover and let rise in a warm place until doubled, about 1 hour. Dough is ready when indentation remains when touched.
6. Punch down the dough. Divide into 6 equal pieces.
7. Shape each piece into a ball. Cover and let rise for 30 minutes.
8. Roll each ball into a circle that is approximately 6-7 inches in diameter and 1/8 inch thick on a floured surface.
9. Place 2 circles in opposite corners of each of 3 cookie sheets.
10. Cover and let rise for another 30 minutes.
11. Preheat the oven to 450F degrees.
12. Bake until loaves are puffed and golden brown, about 10 minutes.
